title: vicia nigricans
intro: Vicia nigricans is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as the black vetch or black vetchling. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Vicia nigricans can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat a range of health conditions, including colds, fever, and skin infections.
